attributes.Sql Query:
select 
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT      
,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  as BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY as FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY   
,'12i' as APPLICATION_VERSION_CD    
, 'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
       (SELECT
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			GLOBAL_NAME,
			DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			PERIOD_COUNTER,
			ASSET_ID,
			DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM ,
			JE_HEADER_ID ,
			DEPRN_AMOUNT,
			COST  ,
			DEPRN_RESERVE ,
			YTD_DEPRN,
			cast(EVENT_ID as VARCHAR(20)) as EVENT_ID
	   FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL
	   where GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	 ) SMOFDD  
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE')  
	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES EGIR
    on ( SMOFDD.EVENT_ID =EGIR.REFERENCE_6
   	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=EGIR.GLOBAL_NAME )
   	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES EXAL
	on  (EGIR.GL_SL_LINK_ID=EXAL.GL_SL_LINK_ID
  AND EXAL.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE = 'EXPENSE'
  and EGIR.GLOBAL_NAME=EXAL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
  
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
			AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
			AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
			AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
		    AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP')  
		    
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
 ON (EGIR.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
       AND EGIR.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
        AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIB_LINKS  XDL /* Added Based on Rama i/p */
 ON(  XDL.AE_HEADER_ID = EXAL.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND XDL.AE_LINE_NUM = EXAL.AE_LINE_NUM
	and XDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_5 = SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID
	and XDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_2 =  SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER
	and XDL.ROUNDING_CLASS_CODE = 'EXPENSE' 
	and XDL.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS EHAH  /* Added Based on Rama  i/p */
ON(EXAL.AE_HEADER_ID =  EHAH.AE_HEADER_ID
	and EXAL.GLOBAL_NAME =  EHAH.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
Inner Join $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGERS EGL /* Added Based on Rama i/p */
on ( EHAH.LEDGER_ID = EGL.LEDGER_ID                     
	And EGL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' 
	and EHAH.GLOBAL_NAME =  EGL.GLOBAL_NAME
)
group by 1,2,3,4,5,6
UNION ALL
select 
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT      
,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  as BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY as FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY   
,'12i' as APPLICATION_VERSION_CD    
, 'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
       (SELECT
         BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			GLOBAL_NAME,
			DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			PERIOD_COUNTER,
			ASSET_ID,
			DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM ,
			JE_HEADER_ID ,
			DEPRN_AMOUNT,
			COST  ,
			DEPRN_RESERVE ,
			YTD_DEPRN,
			cast(EVENT_ID as VARCHAR(20)) as EVENT_ID
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL_LINK   
		where GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
	 ) SMOFDD  

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE')  
	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES EGIR
    on ( SMOFDD.EVENT_ID =EGIR.REFERENCE_6
   	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=EGIR.GLOBAL_NAME )
   	
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES EXAL
	on  (EGIR.GL_SL_LINK_ID=EXAL.GL_SL_LINK_ID
  AND EXAL.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE = 'EXPENSE'
  and EGIR.GLOBAL_NAME=EXAL.GLOBAL_NAME)
  
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
  
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
			AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
			AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
			AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
		    AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP')  
		    
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
 ON (EGIR.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
       AND EGIR.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
        AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD
       )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIB_LINKS  XDL /* Added Based on Rama i/p */
 ON(  XDL.AE_HEADER_ID = EXAL.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND XDL.AE_LINE_NUM = EXAL.AE_LINE_NUM
	and XDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_5 = SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID
	and XDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_2 =  SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER
	and XDL.ROUNDING_CLASS_CODE = 'EXPENSE' 
	and XDL.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS EHAH  /* Added Based on Rama  i/p */
ON(EXAL.AE_HEADER_ID =  EHAH.AE_HEADER_ID
	and EXAL.GLOBAL_NAME =  EHAH.GLOBAL_NAME)
Inner Join $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGERS EGL /* Added Based on Rama i/p */
on ( EHAH.LEDGER_ID = EGL.LEDGER_ID                     
	And EGL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' 
	and EHAH.GLOBAL_NAME =  EGL.GLOBAL_NAME)
group by 1,2,3,4,5,6
union all
select 
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT      
,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  as BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY as FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY   
,'11i' as APPLICATION_VERSION_CD    
, 'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
       (
        SELECT
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			GLOBAL_NAME,
			DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			PERIOD_COUNTER,
			ASSET_ID,
			DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM ,
			JE_HEADER_ID ,
			DEPRN_AMOUNT,
			COST  ,
			DEPRN_RESERVE ,
			YTD_DEPRN,
			cast(EVENT_ID as VARCHAR(20)) as EVENT_ID
	   FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL
	   where GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	 ) SMOFDD  

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE')  
	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
  
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
			AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
			AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
			AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
		    AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP')  
		    
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
 ON (SMOFDD.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
       AND SMOFDD.DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
        AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD)
		
union all
select 
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT      
,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  as BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY as FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY   
,'11i' as APPLICATION_VERSION_CD    
, 'I' AS ACTION_CODE 
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
        (SELECT
			BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
			GLOBAL_NAME,
			DISTRIBUTION_ID,
			PERIOD_COUNTER,
			ASSET_ID,
			DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM ,
			JE_HEADER_ID ,
			DEPRN_AMOUNT,
			COST  ,
			DEPRN_RESERVE ,
			YTD_DEPRN,
			cast(EVENT_ID as VARCHAR(20)) as EVENT_ID
		FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL_LINK   
		where GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	 ) SMOFDD  

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE')  
	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
  
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
			AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
			AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
			AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
		    AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP')  
		    
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
 ON (SMOFDD.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
       AND SMOFDD.DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
        AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD)

SELECT 
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT      
,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT AS BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  AS BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY AS SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY AS FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY   
,'12i' AS APPLICATION_VERSION_CD    
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM 
(
        SELECT 
        ST.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
       ST.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
       ST.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID,
       ST.ASSET_ID,
       ST.BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
       ST.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
       ST.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
       ST.DISTRIBUTION_ID,
       ST.GES_PK_ID,
       ST.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
       ST.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
       ST.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,
       ST.GLOBAL_NAME
       from $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS ST
           where ST.GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
       UNION ALL
       SELECT 
	   EX.ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
       EX.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
       EX.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID,
       EX.ASSET_ID,
       EX.BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
       EX.CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
       EX.DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
       EX.DISTRIBUTION_ID,
       EX.GES_PK_ID,
       EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
       EX.PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
       EX.SOURCE_TYPE_CODE,
       EX.GLOBAL_NAME
       FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_ADJUSTMENTS_LINK EX
                 where EX.GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
           )
            STFA
Inner Join $$STGDB.WI_FA_ADJUSTMENTS WIFAD 
   ON(   STFA.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID = WIFAD.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID
    	AND  STFA.GLOBAL_NAME = WIFAD.GLOBAL_NAME
     )
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS ELXEH
 ON ( ELXEH.AE_HEADER_ID = WIFAD.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND ELXEH.GLOBAL_NAME= WIFAD.GLOBAL_NAME 
	)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_LINES EXEL
ON ( EXEL.AE_HEADER_ID = ELXEH.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND EXEL.APPLICATION_ID = ELXEH.APPLICATION_ID
	AND EXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = ELXEH.GLOBAL_NAME
	/* AND EXEL.ACCOUNTING_CLASS_CODE = 'EXPENSE' */  /* Added Based on Rama  i/p */
	)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_DISTRIB_LINKS EXDL
ON (
	 EXDL.AE_HEADER_ID = ELXEH.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND EXDL.APPLICATION_ID = EXEL.APPLICATION_ID
	AND EXDL.AE_HEADER_ID = EXEL.AE_HEADER_ID
	AND EXDL.AE_LINE_NUM = EXEL.AE_LINE_NUM
	AND EXDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_1 = STFA.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID
	AND EXDL.SOURCE_DISTRIBUTION_ID_NUM_2 = STFA.ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID
	AND EXDL.GLOBAL_NAME = EXEL.GLOBAL_NAME
	)
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_IMPORT_REFERENCES EGIR
 ON ( EXEL.GL_SL_LINK_ID        = EGIR.GL_SL_LINK_ID
	AND EGIR.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE     = 'XLAJEL'
	AND EXEL.GLOBAL_NAME        = EGIR.GLOBAL_NAME
	) 

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (STFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND STFA.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE')  
	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = STFA.GLOBAL_NAME
	
INNER  JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL SMFATD 
	ON ( 	STFA.GES_PK_ID =SMFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
			AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
		    AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'ADJ')  
		    
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
 ON (EGIR.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
       AND EGIR.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
        AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD
       )
 Inner Join $$ETLVWDB.EL_GL_LEDGERS EGL /* Added Based on Rama  i/p */
on ( ELXEH.LEDGER_ID = EGL.LEDGER_ID                     
	And EGL.LEDGER_CATEGORY_CODE = 'PRIMARY' 
	and ELXEH.GLOBAL_NAME =  EGL.GLOBAL_NAME
)
group by 1,2,3,4,5,6
union all
select 
NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT      
,NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT as BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
,NJEL.BK_COMPANY_CODE  as BK_COMPANY_CD                 
,NJEL.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY as SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY              
,SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY as FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY   
,'11i' as APPLICATION_VERSION_CD    
,'I' AS ACTION_CODE
,'I' AS DML_TYPE
FROM
	(
	SELECT 
		GES_PK_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
		PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
		JE_HEADER_ID,
		JE_LINE_NUM,
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		SOURCE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
		ASSET_ID,
		CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		ACTION_CODE
	 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
	 where  ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT<>0   
	 	AND JE_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL
	 	AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'
	 union all
	 	SELECT 
		GES_PK_ID,
		GLOBAL_NAME,
		BOOK_TYPE_CODE,
		DISTRIBUTION_ID,
		DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG,
		PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED,
		JE_HEADER_ID,
		JE_LINE_NUM,
		TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
		SOURCE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT,
		ASSET_ID,
		CODE_COMBINATION_ID,
		ACTION_CODE
	 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_ADJUSTMENTS_LINK
	 where  ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT<>0   
	 	AND JE_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL
	 	AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'	 	
	)SMOFA 
INNER JOIN  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (  SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE
		AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME = ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME 
		AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS='CORPORATE'
		) 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	 ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME)  

INNER  JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  SMFATD  
	ON  (SMOFA.GES_PK_ID=SMFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
        AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMFATD.SS_CD
		AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD= 'ADJ')   
		
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE NJEL
		ON  (SMOFA.JE_HEADER_ID = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUMBER_INT
		AND SMOFA.JE_LINE_NUM = NJEL.BK_JOURNAL_ENTRY_LINE_NUM_INT 
		AND NSSC. SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE = NJEL.SS_CD	)

SELECT  
BATCH_ID                      
,ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               
,ANNUALIZED_ADJUSTMENT         
,ASSET_ID                      
,ASSET_INVOICE_ID              
,SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG             
,DEPRN_OVERRIDE_FLAG           
,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,GES_PK_ID                     
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
,SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,JE_LINE_NUM                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,PERIOD_COUNTER_ADJUSTED       
,PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED        
,SOURCE_TYPE_CODE              
,TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID         
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
, EXCEPTION_TYPE   
from
(
select 
BATCH_ID                      
,ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               
,ANNUALIZED_ADJUSTMENT         
,ASSET_ID                      
,ASSET_INVOICE_ID              
,BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG             
,DEPRN_OVERRIDE_FLAG           
,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,GES_PK_ID                     
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,JE_LINE_NUM                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,PERIOD_COUNTER_ADJUSTED       
,PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED        
,SOURCE_TYPE_CODE              
,TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID         
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
, 'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE          
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
	 where  ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT<>0   
	 	AND JE_HEADER_ID IS NOT NULL
	 	AND GLOBAL_NAME='US'      
union all
select 
BATCH_ID                      
,ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT             
,ADJUSTMENT_TYPE               
,ANNUALIZED_ADJUSTMENT         
,ASSET_ID                      
,ASSET_INVOICE_ID              
,BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,CODE_COMBINATION_ID           
,DEBIT_CREDIT_FLAG             
,DEPRN_OVERRIDE_FLAG           
,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,GES_PK_ID                     
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE13            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE14            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE15            
,GLOBAL_ATTRIBUTE3             
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,JE_LINE_NUM                   
,LAST_UPDATED_BY               
,LAST_UPDATE_DATE              
,LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             
,PERIOD_COUNTER_ADJUSTED       
,PERIOD_COUNTER_CREATED        
,SOURCE_TYPE_CODE              
,TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID         
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,ADJUSTMENT_LINE_ID            
, 'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE          
 FROM $$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_ADJUSTMENTS
    WHERE GLOBAL_NAME='BE'
    )SMOFA
    INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFA.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE'
	)  

WHERE NOT EXISTS
	(
	SELECT 1 FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  SMFATD,
												 $$WORKDB.W_JE_LN_SRC_LNK_FA_TRX_DTL WJLFTD,
												 $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	  where   SMOFA.GES_PK_ID=SMFATD.SK_GES_PK_ID_INT
        AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SMFATD.SS_CD
        		AND    SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD= 'ADJ'   
        		AND SMOFA.GLOBAL_NAME=NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME
        		AND WJLFTD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY = SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY
 	)

select 
BATCH_ID                      
,ADDITION_COST_TO_CLEAR        
,ASSET_ID                      
,BONUS_DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT 
,BONUS_DEPRN_AMOUNT            
,BONUS_DEPRN_EXP_JE_LINE_NUM   
,BONUS_DEPRN_RESERVE           
,BONUS_DEPRN_RSV_JE_LINE_NUM   
,BONUS_YTD_DEPRN               
,SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,COST                          
,DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT       
,DEPRN_AMOUNT                  
,DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,DEPRN_RESERVE                 
,DEPRN_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,DEPRN_RUN_DATE                
,DEPRN_SOURCE_CODE             
,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME                   
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,PERIOD_COUNTER                
,REVAL_AMORTIZATION            
,REVAL_AMORT_JE_LINE_NUM       
,REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE           
,REVAL_RESERVE                 
,REVAL_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,YTD_DEPRN                     
,YTD_REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE       
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE                
,EVENT_ID  
from
(
select 
BATCH_ID                      
,ADDITION_COST_TO_CLEAR        
,ASSET_ID                      
,BONUS_DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT 
,BONUS_DEPRN_AMOUNT            
,BONUS_DEPRN_EXP_JE_LINE_NUM   
,BONUS_DEPRN_RESERVE           
,BONUS_DEPRN_RSV_JE_LINE_NUM   
,BONUS_YTD_DEPRN               
,BOOK_TYPE_CODE                
,COST                          
,DEPRN_ADJUSTMENT_AMOUNT       
,DEPRN_AMOUNT                  
,DEPRN_EXPENSE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,DEPRN_RESERVE                 
,DEPRN_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,DEPRN_RUN_DATE                
,DEPRN_SOURCE_CODE             
,DISTRIBUTION_ID               
,GES_UPDATE_DATE               
,GLOBAL_NAME                   
,JE_HEADER_ID                  
,PERIOD_COUNTER                
,REVAL_AMORTIZATION            
,REVAL_AMORT_JE_LINE_NUM       
,REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE           
,REVAL_RESERVE                 
,REVAL_RESERVE_JE_LINE_NUM     
,YTD_DEPRN                     
,YTD_REVAL_DEPRN_EXPENSE       
,CREATE_DATETIME               
,ACTION_CODE                   
,'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE                
,EVENT_ID                      
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_MF_FA_DEPRN_DETAIL
 )SMOFDD
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS ELBC
	ON (SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE=ELBC.BOOK_TYPE_CODE 
	AND SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME=ELBC.GLOBAL_NAME
	AND ELBC.BOOK_CLASS= 'CORPORATE'
	)  
WHERE NOT EXISTS
		(  select 1 from  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL  SMFATD,
		$$WORKDB.W_JE_LN_SRC_LNK_FA_TRX_DTL WJLFTD ,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
	WHERE	SMOFDD.DISTRIBUTION_ID=SMFATD.SK_DISTRIBUTION_ID_INT 
	AND   SMOFDD.BOOK_TYPE_CODE= SMFATD.SK_BOOK_TYPE_CD  
	AND	SMOFDD.PERIOD_COUNTER=SMFATD.SK_PERIOD_COUNTER_INT 
	AND  NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE =SMFATD.SS_CD
	AND SMFATD.SS_TABLE_CD = 'DEP'
	AND NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SMOFDD.GLOBAL_NAME
AND WJLFTD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY = SMFATD.FIXED_ASSET_TRX_DETAIL_KEY
	)

select 
  EFTH.TRANSACTION_HEADER_ID,
  EFTH.GLOBAL_NAME,
  EXE. EVENT_ID,
  EXEH.AE_HEADER_ID
     from 
           $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_TXN_HEADERS  EFTH,
           $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_EVENTS EXE,
           $$ETLVWDB.EL_XLA_AE_HEADERS EXEH
    WHERE 1=1
    AND  EXE.EVENT_ID = EFTH.EVENT_ID
    AND  EXE.GLOBAL_NAME = EFTH.GLOBAL_NAME
    AND   EXEH.APPLICATION_ID = 140
    AND   EXEH.ENTITY_ID = EXE.ENTITY_ID
    AND EXEH.GLOBAL_NAME = EXE.GLOBAL_NAME
